text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week doesn't seem to be feeling well...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Actually, my head kind of hurts... I wonder why...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's because I woke up and went back to
sleep twice after having dreams about eating
tasty foods...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Or maybe it's because I shared a whole lot of ice
cream with El and the others and ate too much...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer... I dunno what the cause is. There
are just way too many possibilities!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week laments over her headache...
